_about: The warm half of an invite: first names only, one entry per friend. The trust half lives in .github/club-members.json (GitHub usernames). A friend's personal link is https://daylightcomputer.club/invite.html?f=<key> — sent by text or email, person to person. The link is warmth, not authentication.

melissa.name: Melissa
melissa.note: You're the first person I wanted to show this to.

jesse.name: Jesse
jesse.note: Saved you a spot at the table — can't wait to see what you bring.

jake.name: Jake
jake.note: The potluck's open — come see what we've been making.

anjan.name: Anjan
anjan.note: The host eats here too — this seat makes gifts addressed to Anjan land on his shelf.
